title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: Onboarding "Organized" screen "Enable now" triggers location permission dialog for Poly Lens with Allow Once, Allow while using app, and Don't allow options
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin the onboarding flow.
4. Observe the location permission dialog that appears for Poly Lens.
expected: A location permission dialog appears for Poly Lens with the following options: "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't allow" (or "Only This Time" on Android). The dialog text explains that Poly Lens uses location to find your device, and includes a link to the Privacy Policy in General Settings.
